title: MouCraft
description: MouCraft is a survival-RP modpack for Minecraft 1.21.1 using NeoForge. Designed for immersive multiplayer gameplay, it combines Create-based automation, town-building with MineColonies and survival mechanics.
body:
# MouCraft MouCraft is a survival-RP modpack for Minecraft 1.21.1 using NeoForge. Designed for immersive multiplayer gameplay, it combines Create-based automation, town-building with MineColonies, seasons and survival mechanics like Tough As Nails, and beautiful visuals using shaders and resource packs. ## Key features: * Build complex machines with Create and its many add-ons * Form and manage villages using MineColonies and Structurize * Experience dynamic weather and seasons via Serene Seasons * Survive with realistic needs using Tough As Nails * Explore enhanced terrain from Biomes O'Plenty * Enjoy immersive sounds and visuals with Complementary Shaders and AmbientSounds ## Mods List
  • Lithium (Fabric/NeoForge)
  • Macaw's Doors
  • Macaw's Furniture
